name: Barbell Curl
cue: Pin elbows to your sides; curl the bar up without swinging your hips.

name: Cable Curl
cue: Step back for constant tension; keep elbows fixed and resist the negative.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
cue: Hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked; touch low on the chest and press up.

name: Concentration Curl
cue: Brace elbow against inner thigh; curl slow and squeeze at the top.

name: Drag Curl
cue: Drag the bar up your torso, elbows driving back instead of forward.

name: Dumbbell Curl
cue: Rotate pinky toward the ceiling as you curl; control the lowering.

name: EZ Bar Curl
cue: Grip the angled handles, elbows glued to ribs; squeeze hard at the top.

name: Farmer's Hold
cue: Stand tall, shoulders back; crush the handles and don't let posture sag.

name: Hammer Curl
cue: Keep palms facing each other; curl up like swinging a hammer, no body english.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
cue: Let arms hang behind your torso; curl without letting elbows drift forward.

name: Machine Dip
cue: Chest up, shoulders down; press through the handles to full elbow lockout.

name: Overhead Cable Triceps Extension
cue: Face away from the stack, elbows high; stretch the triceps, then lock out.

name: Overhead Dumbbell Triceps Extension
cue: Keep elbows close to your ears; lower deep behind the head, then extend.

name: Preacher Curl
cue: Keep armpits snug on the pad; lower slowly and stop just short of lockout.

name: Reverse Curl
cue: Overhand grip, wrists straight; curl without letting the knuckles drop.

name: Reverse Wrist Curl
cue: Palms down, forearms supported; lift the knuckles toward you, go light.

name: Skullcrusher
cue: Lower the bar to your forehead with elbows tucked; extend without flaring.

name: Spider Curl
cue: Chest on the incline pad, arms hanging straight down; curl with zero swing.

name: Triceps Bar Pushdown
cue: Lock elbows at your sides; press to full extension and control the return.

name: Triceps Kickback
cue: Keep upper arm parallel to the floor; extend fully and pause at lockout.

name: Triceps Rope Pushdown
cue: Pin elbows to your sides; split the rope apart at the bottom.

name: Wrist Curl
cue: Rest forearms on your thighs; curl the wrists up through a full range.

name: Back Extension
cue: Hinge at the hips, rise until your body is straight — don't hyperextend.

name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
cue: Hinge to 45 degrees, pull the bar to your lower ribs, no torso heave.

name: Barbell Shrug
cue: Shrug straight up to your ears, pause, and lower slow — no rolling.

name: Chest-Supported Dumbbell Row
cue: Chest pinned to the incline, drive elbows back without lifting off the pad.

name: Chin-Up
cue: Palms facing you, pull elbows to your ribs and control the way down.

name: Close-Grip Lat Pulldown
cue: Lean back slightly and pull the handle to your sternum, elbows tight.

name: Conventional Deadlift
cue: Brace hard, push the floor away, and keep the bar dragging up your shins.

name: Dumbbell Bent-Over Row
cue: Flat back, row both bells to your hips and squeeze the shoulder blades.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
cue: Arms relaxed at your sides, lift the traps straight up and hold the top.

name: Good Morning
cue: Soft knees, push hips back until hamstrings load, then stand up tall.

name: Lat Pulldown
cue: Pull the bar to your collarbone with elbows down, not behind your neck.

name: Pendlay Row
cue: Torso parallel to the floor, rip the bar from a dead stop each rep.

name: Pull-Up
cue: Start from a dead hang and pull your chest to the bar, not chin over it.

name: Rack Pull
cue: Set pins at knee height, brace, and drive hips through to a tall lockout.

name: Reverse-Grip Lat Pulldown
cue: Underhand grip, drive elbows to your ribs and squeeze the lower lats.

name: Seal Row
cue: Stay glued to the bench, pull to the pad, and pause the squeeze at the top.

name: Seated Cable Row
cue: Sit tall, pull the handle to your navel, and let the lats stretch forward.

name: Single-Arm Cable Row
cue: Resist trunk rotation and drive the elbow straight back past your ribs.

name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
cue: Square hips, pull the bell to your hip pocket, not your armpit.

name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
cue: Arms nearly straight, sweep the bar to your thighs using only the lats.

name: Sumo Deadlift
cue: Spread the floor with your feet, chest up, and lock out with the glutes.

name: T-Bar Row
cue: Hinge over the bar, keep hips still, and row the handle into your chest.

name: Archer Push-Up
cue: Lower toward one hand while the other arm stays straight, shift the load side to side.

name: Burpee
cue: Chest to floor, snap hips up, and finish each rep with a full jump and overhead reach.

name: Decline Push-Up
cue: Feet on a bench, body in one straight line — don't let hips sag as you press.

name: Diamond Push-Up
cue: Form a diamond with thumbs and index fingers, keep elbows tucked as you lower.

name: Dip
cue: Lower until shoulders dip below elbows, lean slightly forward, press to lockout.

name: Handstand Push-Up
cue: Stack wrists, elbows and shoulders — lower head to the floor under control, press straight up.

name: Inverted Row
cue: Keep your body rigid like a plank and pull your chest to the bar.

name: Jump Squat
cue: Sink into a full squat, explode up, and land soft with knees tracking over toes.

name: Muscle-Up
cue: Pull explosively to the sternum, lean over the bar, then press out of the dip.

name: Neutral-Grip Pull-Up
cue: Palms facing each other, pull elbows to your ribs and keep shoulders away from your ears.

name: Pistol Squat
cue: Extend the free leg forward, sit back slowly and keep the heel planted the whole way down.

name: Weighted Dip
cue: Let the belt weight settle before descending, stay controlled and press to full lockout.

name: Weighted Pull-Up
cue: Brace hard to stop the plate swinging, pull chin cleanly over the bar every rep.

name: Wide Push-Up
cue: Hands wider than shoulders, lower chest between them without flaring elbows past 45 degrees.

name: Assault Bike
cue: Push and pull the arms while you pedal — drive with legs and arms together.

name: Elliptical
cue: Push through whole foot, stay upright, drive the handles instead of hanging on.

name: Farmer Carry
cue: Chest tall, crush the grip, short quick steps — note the weight used in your log.

name: HIIT Circuit
cue: Go hard on work intervals, keep transitions crisp, protect form as you fatigue.

name: Hiking
cue: Shorten your stride on climbs and drive through the heels, pace your breathing.

name: Incline Walk
cue: Stand tall without holding the rails, drive through the whole foot.

name: Jump Rope
cue: Stay on the balls of your feet, small low hops, spin the rope from the wrists.

name: Outdoor Cycling
cue: Keep a steady cadence around 80-90 rpm, relax your grip and shoulders.

name: Outdoor Run
cue: Quick light steps, slight forward lean from the ankles, easy arm swing.

name: Rowing Machine
cue: Drive legs first, then swing back, then pull arms — reverse on the return.

name: Stair Climber
cue: Take full steps, stand tall, rest fingertips on rails — don't lean on them.

name: Stationary Bike
cue: Set saddle so knee stays slightly bent at the bottom, pedal smooth circles.

name: Swimming
cue: Keep body long and level in the water, exhale steadily, rotate with each stroke.

name: Treadmill Run
cue: Run tall, land midfoot under your hips, keep shoulders relaxed.

name: Barbell Bench Press
cue: Pinch shoulder blades, feet planted, lower bar to mid-chest, press up and slightly back.

name: Barbell Floor Press
cue: Pause when your triceps touch the floor, then press; keep elbows about 45 degrees.

name: Cable Crossover
cue: Lean slightly forward; pull the handles down and across, squeezing at the bottom.

name: Cable Fly
cue: Step forward with a slight lean; bring hands together with soft elbows and squeeze.

name: Decline Barbell Bench Press
cue: Tuck elbows slightly, lower the bar to your lower chest, keep hips on the bench.

name: Decline Dumbbell Bench Press
cue: Control the descent; press the dumbbells up over your lower chest, not your neck.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
cue: Keep wrists stacked over elbows; lower the dumbbells to chest level with control.

name: Dumbbell Fly
cue: Slight elbow bend; arc the weights wide like hugging a barrel and feel the stretch.

name: Dumbbell Pullover
cue: Slight elbow bend; lower the dumbbell behind your head, feel the stretch, pull back over.

name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
cue: Set the bench 30-45 degrees; touch the bar to upper chest with elbows about 45 degrees.

name: Incline Dumbbell Bench Press
cue: Press up and slightly inward; don't let the dumbbells drift back over your face.

name: Incline Dumbbell Fly
cue: Keep a fixed elbow bend; open wide over the upper chest and squeeze on the way up.

name: Incline Machine Chest Press
cue: Drive the handles up and together; keep shoulder blades pinned to the pad.

name: Landmine Press
cue: Brace your core and press the bar up and forward; don't let your ribs flare.

name: Low-to-High Cable Fly
cue: Set pulleys low; sweep hands up and in to eye level, squeezing the upper chest.

name: Machine Chest Press
cue: Set the seat so handles line up with mid-chest; press smoothly without slamming the stack.

name: Pec Deck
cue: Sit tall with elbows slightly bent; squeeze the pads together and pause a beat.

name: Push-Up
cue: Body in a straight line; lower chest to the floor with elbows about 45 degrees.

name: Smith Machine Bench Press
cue: Position the bench so the bar path meets mid-chest; keep shoulder blades retracted.

name: Smith Machine Incline Bench Press
cue: Touch the bar to your upper chest; press without shrugging your shoulders.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
cue: Tuck pelvis, brace hard, roll out only as far as you can without arching.

name: Bird Dog
cue: Reach opposite arm and leg long, keep hips square and back flat.

name: Cable Crunch
cue: Keep hips still, crunch spine down by pulling ribs to pelvis, not arms.

name: Crunch
cue: Curl ribs toward hips, exhale hard at the top, don't pull on your neck.

name: Dead Bug
cue: Press lower back flat, extend opposite arm and leg slowly, exhale fully.

name: Decline Sit-Up
cue: Control the way down, curl up through the spine, don't yank with your neck.

name: Hanging Knee Raise
cue: Curl knees toward chest and tuck pelvis under, lower slowly without swing.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
cue: Tilt pelvis back and raise legs with abs, no swinging or momentum.

name: Lying Leg Raise
cue: Press lower back into the floor, lower legs slowly without arching.

name: Mountain Climbers
cue: Keep hips low and level, drive knees fast while shoulders stay over wrists.

name: Pallof Press
cue: Press straight out and resist the pull, don't let torso or hips rotate.

name: Plank
cue: Squeeze glutes, brace abs, keep a straight line from head to heels.

name: Russian Twist
cue: Lean back, chest tall, rotate shoulders side to side, not just the arms.

name: Side Plank
cue: Stack shoulders and hips, push the floor away, don't let hips sag.

name: Sit-Up
cue: Roll up one vertebra at a time, keep feet down and control the descent.

name: V-Up
cue: Lift legs and torso together, reach for your toes, lower with control.

name: Assisted Pull-Up Machine
cue: Drive elbows down to your sides and squeeze lats; avoid kipping off the pad.

name: Band Face Pull
cue: Pull to your face with high elbows and rotate knuckles back at the end.

name: Band Pull-Apart
cue: Arms straight at shoulder height; pull the band to your chest and squeeze the blades.

name: Battle Ropes
cue: Sit into an athletic stance and make waves from the shoulders, not the wrists.

name: Cable Pallof Press
cue: Press straight out and resist the twist; keep hips and shoulders square.

name: Cable Woodchopper
cue: Rotate from the torso with straight arms; pivot the back foot as you chop.

name: Glute Ham Raise
cue: Keep hips extended and lower slowly; pull yourself up with the hamstrings.

name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
cue: Hold the bell at your chest, elbows inside knees, sit deep between your heels.

name: Kettlebell Swing
cue: Snap the hips forward hard; arms just guide the bell, don't lift it.

name: Seated Row Machine
cue: Pull handles to your torso and squeeze shoulder blades; don't lean back.

name: Sled Push
cue: Stay low with arms locked; drive with short, powerful alternating steps.

name: Smith Machine Row
cue: Hinge at the hips, pull the bar to your lower ribs, squeeze the back.

name: Turkish Get-Up
cue: Keep eyes on the bell and arm locked; move slowly through each position.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
cue: Chin tucked, drive through heels, squeeze glutes hard at lockout.

name: Cable Glute Kickback
cue: Kick back and slightly up with a squeeze, no swinging or arching.

name: Cable Pull-Through
cue: Hinge back into the cable, then snap hips forward and squeeze glutes.

name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
cue: Push hips back, keep dumbbells close to legs, flat back throughout.

name: Glute Bridge
cue: Squeeze glutes to lift hips, don't arch the lower back.

name: Hip Abduction Machine
cue: Push knees apart with control, pause at the widest point.

name: Hip Adduction Machine
cue: Squeeze knees together smoothly, resist the pads on the way out.

name: Lying Leg Curl
cue: Curl heels to glutes without lifting hips off the pad.

name: Machine Hip Thrust
cue: Ribs down, thrust to full hip extension and pause at the top.

name: Nordic Curl
cue: Lock hips straight and lower as slowly as possible, resist all the way down.

name: Romanian Deadlift
cue: Hinge at hips with soft knees, slide bar down thighs until hamstrings stretch.

name: Seated Calf Raise
cue: Slow deep stretch at the bottom, drive up through the balls of your feet.

name: Seated Leg Curl
cue: Pin thighs under the pad, squeeze at full flexion, control the return.

name: Single-Leg Calf Raise
cue: Balance on one foot, full range from deep stretch to high on the toe.

name: Standing Calf Raise
cue: Full stretch at the bottom, rise high onto toes, pause at the top.

name: Stiff-Leg Deadlift
cue: Keep legs nearly straight, hinge deep, never round the lower back.

name: Barbell Back Squat
cue: Brace hard, sit down between your hips, drive up through midfoot.

name: Belt Squat
cue: Stay tall, let the belt load the hips, squat deep without spinal load.

name: Box Squat
cue: Sit back to the box under control, pause, explode up without rocking.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
cue: Rear foot on bench, drop straight down, drive through the front heel.

name: Dumbbell Step-Up
cue: Drive through the top leg only, avoid pushing off the bottom foot.

name: Front Squat
cue: Elbows high, chest tall, sit straight down.

name: Goblet Squat
cue: Hold the weight at your chest, elbows inside knees, sit deep.

name: Hack Squat
cue: Back flat on the pad, deep knee bend, push through the whole foot.

name: Leg Extension
cue: Extend fully and squeeze quads at the top, lower slowly.

name: Leg Press
cue: Lower until knees near chest without lifting hips, press without locking out.

name: Reverse Lunge
cue: Step back, keep front shin vertical, drive up through the front heel.

name: Single Leg Press
cue: Foot centered on the platform, hips square, press without locking out.

name: Sissy Squat
cue: Lean back, push knees forward over toes, keep hips extended.

name: Smith Machine Squat
cue: Feet slightly forward of the bar, control the descent, drive through heels.

name: Walking Lunge
cue: Long stride, back knee kisses the floor, push off the front leg.

name: Zercher Squat
cue: Cradle the bar in your elbows, stay upright, squat deep.

name: Arnold Press
cue: Start palms facing you, rotate out as you press; keep the rotation smooth.

name: Barbell Overhead Press
cue: Squeeze glutes, brace core, press the bar overhead and lock out over midfoot.

name: Barbell Upright Row
cue: Pull the bar to chest height with elbows leading; keep it close to your body.

name: Cable Front Raise
cue: Raise the handle to shoulder height under control; keep the torso still.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
cue: Stand tall and raise the handle to shoulder height, keeping constant cable tension.

name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
cue: Pull the cables apart in a wide arc and squeeze the rear delts at the end.

name: Cable Upright Row
cue: Let the elbows lead the pull to chest height; keep wrists relaxed and the bar close.

name: Dumbbell Front Raise
cue: Raise to eye level with nearly straight arms; no swinging or leaning back.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
cue: Slight elbow bend, lead with the elbows, raise to shoulder height without swinging.

name: Dumbbell Rear Delt Fly
cue: Hinge at the hips with a flat back, sweep the dumbbells wide leading with elbows.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
cue: Press the dumbbells up and slightly in; don't let elbows drop far below 90 degrees.

name: Face Pull
cue: Pull the rope to your forehead with elbows high, rotating knuckles back at the end.

name: Machine Lateral Raise
cue: Drive the elbows up to shoulder height and pause briefly at the top.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
cue: Set the seat so handles start at shoulder height; press up without shrugging.

name: Push Press
cue: Dip at the knees, drive the bar up with the legs, then punch to lockout overhead.

name: Reverse Pec Deck
cue: Chest on the pad, sweep the arms back in a wide arc and squeeze the shoulder blades.

name: Seated Barbell Overhead Press
cue: Keep lower back against the pad; lower to chin level and press up without flaring ribs.

name: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press
cue: Back flat on the pad, lower to ear level, press up without clanking at the top.
